data.title: Block’s Strategic Initiatives and Strong Financial Outlook Drive Long-term Investment Appeal
data.description:
Block, the Technology sector company, was revisited by a Wall Street analyst yesterday. Analyst Bryan Bergin from TD Cowen maintained a Buy rating on the stock and has a $91.00 price target.

Meet Your ETF AI Analyst

  • Discover how TipRanks' ETF AI Analyst can help you make smarter investment decisions
  • Explore ETFs TipRanks' users love and see what insights the ETF AI Analyst reveals about the ones you follow.

Bryan Bergin’s rating is based on Block’s strong performance and strategic initiatives showcased during their Investor Day. The company presented a solid 2026 guidance and a favorable three-year outlook, which exceeds market expectations. This is underpinned by sustained mid-teens gross profit growth and rising operating income margins, leading to an attractive 30% growth in both EPS and cash flow.
Furthermore, Block’s AI-forward approach and its unique asset ecosystem are driving development velocity. The company’s reorganization efforts have enhanced its focus and execution, particularly in its Cash App and Square ecosystems. Block’s financial profile, including its EPS and FCF targets, suggests significant undervaluation, making it appealing to long-term investors. The company’s commitment to increased transparency and regular disclosure is also expected to address investor concerns, particularly regarding its lending products, which are showing strong profitability.

In another report released yesterday, BTIG also maintained a Buy rating on the stock with a $90.00 price target.
data.author: TipRanks Auto-Generated Intelligence Newsdesk
